name: Ziti Casserole--291073
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Container Ricotta cheese or cream style cottage cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ziti and drain.
2. In a large bowl, combine Ricotta or cottage cheese, Mozzarella, Parmesan, egg, salt, and pepper.
3. Layer the cooked ziti, cheese mixture, and tomato sauce in a 13 x 9 x 2 inch casserole dish, starting and ending with the tomato sauce.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 40 minutes.
